task_completion.description: Download the Gapminder dataset to the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser downloading the file, a terminal showing a download command (like wget or curl), or a file manager showing 'gapminder.json' in '/home/ga/Documents'.

task_completion.description: Create a document titled 'Demographic Transition Worksheet'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A word processor (e.g., LibreOffice Writer) is open with the text 'Demographic Transition Worksheet' clearly visible as the title or main heading of the document.
The document contains the exact section headings: 'Lesson Overview', 'Data Table', and 'Student Questions'.

task_completion.description: Populate the 'Data Table' with 12 extracted numeric values for the specified countries and years.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Data Table' heading, there are 12 unrounded numeric values (typically with decimal places) corresponding to life expectancy and fertility rate for Rwanda, Afghanistan, and Japan for the years 1955 and 2005.

task_completion.description: Save the document in ODT format to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The word processor's title bar shows 'demographics_worksheet.odt', a 'Save As' dialog shows the correct path '/home/ga/Documents/demographics_worksheet.odt', or a file manager displays the saved .odt file in the Documents folder.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI word processor to create the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a word processor like LibreOffice Writer being used to edit the document, rather than a terminal script or plain text editor generating the ODT file.

integrity.description: The agent extracted data from the downloaded dataset.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent viewing the JSON file (e.g., in a browser, text editor, or terminal) or running a script to extract the values, rather than typing them from memory.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file properly using the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file 'demographics_worksheet.odt' is seen in the file manager or the save dialog of the word processor, confirming it was saved correctly in the requested format.
